title: MaintenanceTask entity (ONT-E-11)
description: A scheduled or condition-based maintenance task (e.g. ATA-71 hot-section inspection, ATA-32 landing-gear bearing greasing). Composes entity.base.schema.json via allOf + $ref. ata_chapter pattern aligns with ontology/vocabularies/ata-chapters.yaml (Plan 10). Pitfall #1 lock: unevaluatedProperties: false at every nested object level. Pitfall #9 lock: $schema = JSON Schema Draft 2020-12. Schema version: 0.1.0.

type.description: Discriminator. Locked to 'MaintenanceTask' for this entity type.

target_component.description: URI of the Component / Subsystem / AircraftSystem this maintenance task is performed on.

ata_chapter.description: ATA iSpec 2200 chapter code, formatted as 'ATA-NN' (e.g. 'ATA-21' Air Conditioning, 'ATA-71' Powerplant). See ontology/vocabularies/ata-chapters.yaml (Plan 10) for the canonical chapter list.

interval.description: Maintenance interval specification. kind selects the metric; value + unit carry the threshold (omit for condition_based / on_condition). Locks unevaluatedProperties: false (Pitfall #1 nested).

kind.description: Interval metric. flight_hours = airframe FH; calendar_time = wall-clock since last performed; cycles = takeoff/landing cycles; condition_based = sensor-driven; on_condition = inspect-and-decide.

value.description: Optional numeric threshold (e.g. 600 for 600 flight hours). Omit for condition_based / on_condition.

unit.description: Optional unit string (e.g. 'hours', 'months', 'cycles'). Omit for condition_based / on_condition.

prerequisites.description: Optional preconditions (e.g. 'aircraft on jacks', 'engine cool to ambient').

tools_required.description: Optional list of tools / GSE required.

certification_basis.description: Optional URI to the RegulationClause or Standard that drives this maintenance task (e.g. an Airworthiness Directive or MSG-3 task card).

estimated_duration_minutes.description: Optional estimated wall-clock duration in minutes.
